interaction.dialogue: Ew, [color=pink]Convicts[/color]. I really hate these guys.

interaction.image: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/neutral.png
interaction.dialogue: You best watch out for them too. They'll try to grab me right out of your hands and then we'd [i]both[/i] be screwed.
